latest_csm_note:
=== CSM Call Notes — Q1 2026 ===
(Internal use only. Various CSMs.)

Mar 12 - Talked to Acme Corp. They're frustrated with the new editor. 
Might be evaluating Hygraph. VP of Engineering was on the call which is unusual.
They mentioned their contract is coming up and want to "explore options." Sarah flagged
this internally but hasn't heard back from leadership.
latest_nps_comment: Support takes forever. Our P1 sat open for 3 weeks.
product_recommendations: ['Prioritize SDK v4 migration', 'Schedule product feedback session', 'Run competitive positioning review']
risk_reasons: API usage declined >50%; Active users declined >50%; Workflow activity collapsed; Multiple P1 incidents; Several unresolved tickets; NPS/comment mismatch; Competitor evaluation; Executive escalation; Product dissatisfaction; Product risk score: 30

latest_csm_note:
2026-03-20 | NovaTech Industries | James O.
Extremely tense call. They've had 4 P1 tickets in the last month, all related to the 
v3 SDK deprecation. Their engineering team spent 200+ hours on workarounds. CTO 
joined the call and asked point blank if we have a migration path. I said we do but 
couldn't give a timeline. They mentioned Strapi and Sanity by name. Need to escalate.
product_recommendations: ['Prioritize SDK v4 migration', 'Run competitive positioning review', 'Assign migration specialist']
risk_reasons: API usage declined >25%; Active users declined >25%; Recent P1 incidents; Several unresolved tickets; Competitor evaluation; Executive escalation; Migration risk; Product risk score: 35

latest_csm_note:
4/5 - Zenith Publishing (#1007)
Renewl conversation started. They want a 30% discount or they walk. Current ARR is 
high but margin is already thin. Editor performance on their 50k+ entry library is 
painful and they know it. Competitor POC with Kontent.ai is apparently already underway.
CRO was cc'd on the last email thread which is never a good sign.
latest_nps_comment: Fine for now but we're watching competitors closely.
product_recommendations: ['Schedule product feedback session', 'Run competitive positioning review']
risk_reasons: Recent P1 incidents; Detractor NPS; Competitor evaluation; Budget pressure; Executive escalation; Product dissatisfaction; Product risk score: 10

latest_nps_comment: We evaluated 5 CMS platforms. Contentstack won easily.
